ValidationRule.description: Only Legal Team and System Admin can edit recipient (Legal)
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT(ISNEW()), RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Legal_Services', ISCHANGED( Recipient_Picklist__c ), NOT(ISCHANGED(Recipient_Email__c )), $Profile.Name <> 'SW Legal', $Profile.Name <> 'System Administrator' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: You don't have permission to edit this field
